title: The sharp affine $L^2$ Sobolev trace inequality and variants
comment:
17 pages including an appendix. The main results from the previous
  version remain unchanged. The structure and notations were modified, several
  typos were corrected and proofs for some technical lemmas were added
summary:
We establish a sharp affine $L^p$ Sobolev trace inequality by using the $L_p$
Busemann-Petty centroid inequality. For $p = 2$, our affine version is stronger
than the famous sharp $L^2$ Sobolev trace inequality proved independently by
Escobar and Beckner. Our approach allows also to characterize all cases of
equality in this case. For this new inequality, no Euclidean geometric
structure is needed.

AI.tldr: 建立了尖锐的仿射L^p Sobolev迹不等式，推广并改进了经典的Sobolev迹不等式
AI.motivation: 经典的Sobolev迹不等式（特别是Escobar和Beckner独立证明的L^2情形）在欧几里得几何结构下成立，本文旨在建立不依赖于欧几里得几何结构的仿射不变版本
AI.techniques: 使用L_p Busemann-Petty质心不等式作为主要工具，通过仿射几何方法构建不等式
AI.main_theorems: 建立了尖锐的仿射L^p Sobolev迹不等式，当p=2时该不等式强于经典的L^2 Sobolev迹不等式，并完全刻画了等号成立的情形
AI.significance: 提供了不依赖于欧几里得几何结构的Sobolev迹不等式，扩展了经典结果的应用范围，在仿射几何和偏微分方程理论中有重要意义

title: Global smoothness of quasiconformal mappings in the Triebel-Lizorkin   scale
summary:
We study quasiconformal mappings in planar domains $\Omega$ and their
regularity properties described in terms of Sobolev, Bessel potential or
Triebel-Lizorkin scales. This leads to optimal conditions, in terms of the
geometry of the boundary $\partial \Omega$ and of the smoothness of the
Beltrami coefficient, that guarantee the global regularity of the mappings in
these classes. In the Triebel-Lizorkin class with smoothness below $1$, the
same conditions give global regularity in $\Omega$ for the principal solutions
with Beltrami coefficient supported in $\Omega$.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了平面拟共形映射在Sobolev、Bessel势和Triebel-Lizorkin空间中的全局正则性，建立了边界几何和Beltrami系数光滑性的最优条件。
AI.motivation: 研究平面区域中拟共形映射的正则性，特别关注映射在Sobolev、Bessel势和Triebel-Lizorkin尺度下的全局正则性，这是拟共形映射理论和偏微分方程中的重要问题。
AI.techniques: 使用拟共形映射理论、Beltrami方程分析、Sobolev空间理论、Bessel势空间和Triebel-Lizorkin空间的嵌入关系，以及边界几何条件的分析。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了保证拟共形映射在Sobolev、Bessel势和Triebel-Lizorkin空间中全局正则性的最优条件，这些条件涉及边界∂Ω的几何性质和Beltrami系数的光滑性；对于光滑性低于1的Triebel-Lizorkin类，相同条件保证了支撑在Ω中的Beltrami系数的主解在Ω中的全局正则性。
AI.significance: 该研究为拟共形映射的正则性理论提供了系统框架，建立了边界几何与映射正则性之间的精确关系，对拟共形映射理论、复分析和椭圆偏微分方程理论有重要贡献。

title: Inverse problems for first-order hyperbolic equations with   time-dependent coefficients
summary:
We prove global Lipschitz stability for inverse source and coefficient
problems for first-order linear hyperbolic equations, the coefficients of which
depend on both space and time. We use a global Carleman estimate, and a crucial
point, introduced in this paper, is the choice of the length of integral curves
of a vector field generated by the principal part of the hyperbolic operator to
construct a weight function for the Carleman estimate. These integral curves
correspond to the characteristic curves in some cases.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有时空依赖系数的一阶线性双曲方程反源和反系数问题的全局Lipschitz稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究具有时空依赖系数的一阶线性双曲方程的反问题，这类问题在医学成像、地球物理勘探等实际应用中具有重要意义，需要建立解的稳定性理论
AI.techniques: 使用全局Carleman估计，关键创新在于通过双曲算子主部生成的向量场的积分曲线长度来构造Carleman估计的权函数，这些积分曲线在某些情况下对应特征曲线
AI.main_theorems: 证明了反源和反系数问题的全局Lipschitz稳定性，即从边界测量数据到未知源项或系数的映射具有Lipschitz连续性
AI.significance: 为具有时空依赖系数的双曲方程反问题提供了严格的稳定性理论，改进了现有结果，所提出的积分曲线长度选择方法对Carleman估计在双曲问题中的应用有重要贡献

title: Reconstruction along a geodesic from sphere data in Finsler geometry and   anisotropic elasticity
summary:
Dix formulated the inverse problem of recovering an elastic body from the
measurements of wave fronts of point sources. We geometrize this problem in the
context of seismology, leading to the geometrical inverse problem of recovering
a Finsler manifold from certain sphere data in a given open subset of the
manifold. We solve this problem locally along any geodesic through the
measurement set.

AI.tldr: 解决了从球面数据局部恢复Finsler流形的几何逆问题，推广了地震学中的Dix逆问题。
AI.motivation: Dix提出了从点源波前测量恢复弹性体的逆问题，本文将该问题几何化到地震学背景，转化为从给定开集中的球面数据恢复Finsler流形的几何逆问题。
AI.techniques: 几何化方法、Finsler几何、测地线分析、局部恢复技术、球面数据构造。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了从测量集中任意测地线出发，可以局部恢复Finsler流形，解决了该几何逆问题的局部可解性。
AI.significance: 将经典Dix逆问题推广到更一般的Finsler几何框架，为地震成像和几何逆问题理论提供了新工具，建立了波前测量与流形几何之间的深刻联系。

title: On Scaling Properties for a Class of Two-Well Problems for Higher Order   Homogeneous Linear Differential Operators
comment:
36 pages, 1 figure, comments welcome; changes in the upper bound
  construction (Lemmas 4.2, 4.5); restricted to $\lambda = 1/2$ in the upper
  bound construction
summary:
We study the scaling behaviour of a class of compatible two-well problems for
higher order, homogeneous linear differential operators. To this end, we first
deduce general lower scaling bounds which are determined by the vanishing order
of the symbol of the operator on the unit sphere in direction of the associated
element in the wave cone. We complement the lower bound estimates by a detailed
analysis of the two-well problem for generalized (tensor-valued) symmetrized
derivatives with the help of the (tensor-valued) Saint-Venant compatibility
conditions. In two spatial dimensions for highly symmetric boundary data (but
arbitrary tensor order $m \in \mathbb{N}$) we provide upper bound constructions
matching the lower bound estimates. This illustrates that for the two-well
problem for higher order operators new scaling laws emerge which are determined
by the Fourier symbol in the direction of the wave cone. The scaling for the
symmetrized gradient from \cite{CC15} which was also discussed in \cite{RRT23}
provides an example of this family of new scaling laws.

AI.tldr: 研究高阶线性微分算子的兼容双井问题的标度行为，揭示了由波锥方向上算子符号的消失阶数决定的新标度律。
AI.motivation: 研究高阶齐次线性微分算子的兼容双井问题的标度行为，这类问题在材料科学和弹性理论中常见，特别是对于高阶算子，其标度律尚未被充分理解。
AI.techniques: 使用傅里叶符号分析、波锥方向上的消失阶数分析、广义对称导数、Saint-Venant兼容条件、上下界估计匹配方法。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了由波锥方向上算子符号消失阶数决定的通用下界标度估计；对于广义对称导数，在二维空间和高度对称边界条件下，构造了匹配下界估计的上界。
AI.significance: 揭示了高阶算子双井问题的新标度律家族，为理解材料微观结构形成提供了新的数学框架，将对称梯度标度律推广到更广泛的高阶算子情形。

title: $\mu hom$ and multi-microlocal operators
summary:
In this paper, we construct the multi-microlocalization functor $\mu
hom_{{\chi}}$ of homomorphisms, which is a counterpart of the functor $\mu hom$
studied by M.Kashiwara and P.Schapira. Furthermore, using the new functor, we
also introduce several sheaves of multi-microlocal operators which act on
multi-microlocalized objects such as a multi-microfunction.

AI.tldr: 构建多微局部化同态函子μhom_χ及其在多微局部算子层上的应用
AI.motivation: Kashiwara和Schapira研究的μhom函子在微局部分析中具有重要作用，本文旨在构建其多微局部化版本，以处理更复杂的奇异性结构
AI.techniques: 运用层论、微局部分析、多微局部化理论，构建函子结构并研究其代数性质
AI.main_theorems: 构造了多微局部化同态函子μhom_χ，并基于此定义了作用于多微局部化对象（如多微函数）的多微局部算子层
AI.significance: 扩展了微局部分析的工具箱，为研究高阶奇异性、多波前集等复杂现象提供了新的代数框架，在偏微分方程理论和奇异性分析中有重要应用

title: Periodic traveling waves for nonlinear Schr\"odinger equations with   non-zero conditions at infinity in $ \R ^2 $
comment:
57 pages, final version. Example 5.7 has been added. This article has
  been published in Calculus of Variations and PDE (2025),
  https://doi.org/10.1007/s00526-024-02921-3
summary:
We consider the nonlinear Schr\"odinger equation with nonzero conditions at
infinity in $\R^2$. We investigate the existence of traveling waves that are
periodic in the direction transverse to the direction of propagation and
minimize the energy when the momentum is kept fixed. We show that for any given
value of the momentum, there is a critical value of the period such that
traveling waves with period smaller than the critical value are
one-dimensional, and those with larger periods depend on two variables.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维非线性薛定谔方程在无穷远非零边界条件下，存在横截面周期行波解，并确定了从一维解到二维解转变的临界周期
AI.motivation: 研究二维非线性薛定谔方程在无穷远非零边界条件下的行波解存在性，特别关注横截面周期解，分析动量固定时能量最小化问题
AI.techniques: 变分方法、能量最小化、动量约束优化、临界点理论、周期边界条件分析
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意给定的动量值，存在临界周期值：当周期小于临界值时行波解是一维的，当周期大于临界值时行波解依赖于两个变量
AI.significance: 揭示了二维非线性薛定谔方程行波解的空间结构转变机制，为理解非线性波传播的维度依赖性提供了理论依据

title: Lipschitz stability for an elliptic inverse problem with two   measurements
summary:
We consider the problem of determining the unknown boundary values of a
solution of an elliptic equation outside a bounded open set $B$ from the
knowledge of the values of this solution on a boundary of an arbitrary
Lipschitz bounded domain surrounding $B$. We obtain for this inverse problem
Lipschitz stability for an admissible class of unknown boundary functions. Our
analysis applies as well to an interior problem. We also give an extension to
the parabolic case.

AI.tldr: 建立了椭圆方程外部区域逆边界值问题的Lipschitz稳定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究椭圆方程在有限开集B外部解的逆边界值问题：已知解在包围B的任意Lipschitz有界域边界上的值，反推解在B边界上的未知边界值
AI.techniques: 利用椭圆方程理论、Lipschitz稳定性分析、适定函数类构造，方法可推广到内部问题和抛物情形
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于某类容许的未知边界函数，该逆问题具有Lipschitz稳定性，结果可推广到内部问题和抛物方程
AI.significance: 为椭圆方程逆边界值问题提供了稳定性理论框架，对反问题理论有重要贡献，可应用于物理和工程中的边界识别问题

title: Global existence of small data weak solutions to the semilinear wave   equations with time-dependent scale-invariant damping
comment:
Some part of this article is not clear enough, later we will submit a
  revised version with rewritten theorems
summary:
In this paper, we are concerned with the global existence of small data weak
solutions to the $n-$dimensional semilinear wave equation $\partial_t^2u-\Delta
u+\frac{\mu}{t}\partial_tu=|u|^p$ with time-dependent scale-invariant damping,
where $n\geq 2$, $t\geq 1$, $\mu\in(0,1)\cup(1,2]$ and $p>1$. This equation can
be changed into the semilinear generalized Tricomi equation
$\partial_t^2u-t^m\Delta u=t^{\alpha(m)}|u|^p$, where $m=m(\mu)>0$ and
$\alpha(m)\in\Bbb R$ are two suitable constants. At first, for the more general
semilinear Tricomi equation $\partial_t^2v-t^m\Delta v=t^{\alpha}|v|^p$ with
any fixed constant $m>0$ and arbitrary parameter $\alpha\in\Bbb R$, we shall
show that in the case of $\alpha\leq -2$, $n\geq 3$ and $p>1$, the small data
weak solution $v$ exists globally; in the case of $\alpha>-2$, through
determining the conformal exponent $p_{conf}(n,m,\alpha)>1$, the global small
data weak solution $v$ exists when some extra restrictions of $p\geq
p_{conf}(n,m,\alpha)$ are given. Returning to the original equation
$\partial_t^2u-\Delta u+\frac{\mu}{t}\partial_tu=|u|^p$, the corresponding
global existence results on the small data solution $u$ can be obtained.

AI.tldr: 研究了具有时间依赖尺度不变阻尼的n维半线性波动方程小数据弱解的全局存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有时间依赖尺度不变阻尼的半线性波动方程的小数据全局解存在性问题，这类方程在数学物理中有重要应用，特别是研究阻尼项对解的长时行为的影响。
AI.techniques: 通过变量变换将原方程转化为广义Tricomi方程，利用能量估计、加权Sobolev空间、共形指数方法，分析不同参数区域下的解行为。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于广义Tricomi方程，当α≤-2时，n≥3且p>1时小数据弱解全局存在；2. 当α>-2时，确定共形指数p_conf(n,m,α)，在p≥p_conf条件下小数据弱解全局存在；3. 将结果应用于原阻尼波动方程得到相应全局存在性。
AI.significance: 建立了具有时间依赖阻尼的半线性波动方程小数据解的全局存在性理论，推广了经典波动方程的结果，为研究变系数波动方程提供了新方法。

title: Convergence in total variation for the kinetic Langevin algorithm
summary:
We prove non asymptotic total variation estimates for the kinetic Langevin
algorithm in high dimension when the target measure satisfies a Poincar\'e
inequality and has gradient Lipschitz potential. The main point is that the
estimate improves significantly upon the corresponding bound for the non
kinetic version of the algorithm, due to Dalalyan. In particular the dimension
dependence drops from $O(n)$ to $O(\sqrt n)$.

AI.tldr: 证明了高维情况下动能Langevin算法的非渐近全变差估计，相比非动能版本将维度依赖从O(n)改进到O(√n)。
AI.motivation: 研究动能Langevin算法在高维优化和采样中的收敛性分析，特别是要改进Dalalyan关于非动能版本算法的维度依赖结果。
AI.techniques: 使用Poincaré不等式和梯度Lipschitz条件，通过非渐近分析方法建立总变差距离的收敛估计。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当目标测度满足Poincaré不等式且梯度Lipschitz时，动能Langevin算法的收敛率维度依赖为O(√n)，显著优于非动能版本的O(n)。
AI.significance: 为高维采样算法提供了更优的理论保证，对机器学习、统计物理等领域的MCMC方法有重要理论意义。

title: Existence and multiplicity of normalized solutions for $(2,q)$-Laplacian   equations with generic double-behaviour nonlinearities
comment:
arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2405.05194 by
  other authors
summary:
In this paper, we study {existence and multiplicity} of normalized solutions
for the following $(2, q)$-Laplacian equation
  \begin{equation*}\label{Eq-Equation1}
  \left\{\begin{array}{l}
  -\Delta u-\Delta_q u+\lambda u=f(u) \quad x \in \mathbb{R}^N ,
  \int_{\mathbb{R}^N}u^2 d x=c^2,
  \end{array}\right.
  \end{equation*}
  where $1<q<N$, $N\geq3$, $\Delta_q=\operatorname{div}\left(|\nabla u|^{q-2}
\nabla u\right)$ denotes the $q$-Laplacian operator, $\lambda$ is a Lagrange
multiplier and $c>0$ is a constant. The nonlinearity $f:\mathbb{R}\rightarrow
\mathbb{R}$ is continuous, with mass-subcritical growth at the origin,
mass-supercritical growth at infinity, and is more general than the sum of two
powers. Under different assumptions, we prove the existence of a locally
least-energy solution and the existence of a second solution with higher
energy.

AI.tldr: 研究(2,q)-Laplacian方程在质量约束下解的存在性和多重性，证明局部最小能量解和第二个更高能量解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究(2,q)-Laplacian方程在质量约束下的归一化解，该方程结合了标准Laplacian和q-Laplacian算子，非线性项具有原点处质量次临界增长和无穷远处质量超临界增长的特性，比两个幂次和更一般
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、Lagrange乘子法、临界点理论，结合质量约束下的能量泛函分析，处理混合(2,q)-Laplacian算子的非齐次性和非线性项的特殊增长条件
AI.main_theorems: 在不同假设下证明：1) 存在局部最小能量解；2) 存在第二个具有更高能量的解，即解的多重性结果
AI.significance: 扩展了(2,q)-Laplacian方程在质量约束下的理论，处理了更一般的非线性项，为这类混合算子方程的解结构提供了新的理解，在数学物理中有潜在应用

title: Constant Scalar Curvature K\"ahler Metrics on Resolutions of an Orbifold   Singularity of Depth 1
summary:
We construct new examples of constant scalar curvature K\"{a}hler metrics on
suitable resolutions of certain constant scalar curvature K\"{a}hler orbifolds
with type I singularities, in the sense of Apostolov--Rollin, along a
suborbifold of complex codimension greater than 2.

AI.tldr: 在具有I型奇点的常数量曲率Kähler orbifold的适当解消上构造新的常数量曲率Kähler度量
AI.motivation: 研究如何在具有奇点的常数量曲率Kähler orbifold上构造光滑的常数量曲率Kähler度量，特别是处理Apostolov-Rollin定义的I型奇点，且奇点子orbifold的复余维数大于2的情况。
AI.techniques: 使用orbifold解消技术，处理I型奇点，结合常数量曲率Kähler度量的构造方法，可能涉及分析方法和几何流技术。
AI.main_theorems: 在满足特定条件的常数量曲率Kähler orbifold的适当解消上构造了新的常数量曲率Kähler度量，这些orbifold具有I型奇点且奇点子orbifold的复余维数大于2。
AI.significance: 扩展了常数量曲率Kähler度量的存在性理论，为具有奇点的几何对象提供了光滑解，在Kähler几何和复几何中有重要应用，特别是对orbifold解消和奇点处理的理论发展有贡献。

title: Critical quasilinear equations on Riemannian manifolds
summary:
In this paper, we investigate critical quasilinear elliptic partial
differential equations on a complete Riemannian manifold with nonnegative Ricci
curvature. By exploiting a new and sharp nonlinear Kato inequality and
establishing some Cheng-Yau type gradient estimates for positive solutions, we
classify positive solutions to the critical $p$-Laplace equation and show
rigidity concerning the ambient manifold. Our results extend and improve some
previous conclusions in the literature. Similar results are obtained for
solutions to the quasilinear Liouville equation involving the $n$-Laplace
operator, where $n$ corresponds to the dimension of the ambient manifold.

AI.tldr: 本文通过建立新的非线性Kato不等式和Cheng-Yau型梯度估计，在非负Ricci曲率完备黎曼流形上分类了临界p-Laplace方程的正解并证明了流形的刚性。
AI.motivation: 研究非负Ricci曲率完备黎曼流形上的临界拟线性椭圆偏微分方程，特别是临界p-Laplace方程和拟线性Liouville方程，旨在分类正解并揭示流形的几何刚性。
AI.techniques: 发展了新的尖锐非线性Kato不等式，建立了Cheng-Yau型梯度估计，结合几何分析和偏微分方程方法研究拟线性椭圆方程的正解性质。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 临界p-Laplace方程正解的分类定理；2. 关于环境流形的刚性结果；3. 涉及n-Laplace算子的拟线性Liouville方程的类似结果。
AI.significance: 扩展并改进了文献中的相关结论，为拟线性椭圆方程在黎曼几何中的研究提供了新工具和新视角，建立了方程解与流形几何性质之间的深刻联系。

title: On the Nonexistence of Global Solutions for Nonlocal Parabolic Equations   with Forcing Terms
comment: 18 pages. We welcome any comments or feedback
summary:
The purpose of this work is to analyze the well-posedness and blow-up
behavior of solutions to the nonlocal semilinear parabolic equation with a
forcing term: \[ \partial_t u - \Delta u = \|u(t)\|_{q}^\alpha |u|^p +
t^{\varrho} \mathbf{w}(x) \quad \text{in} \quad \mathbb{R}^N \times (0,
\infty), \]
  where $N \geq 1$, $p, q \geq 1$, $\alpha \geq 0$, $\varrho > -1$, and
$\mathbf{w}(x)$ is a suitably given continuous function.
  The novelty of this work, compared to previous studies, lies in considering a
nonlocal nonlinearity $\|u(t)\|_{q}^\alpha |u|^p$ and a forcing term
$t^{\varrho} \mathbf{w}(x)$ that depend on both time and space variables. This
combination introduces new challenges in understanding the interplay between
the nonlocal structure of the equation and the spatio-temporal forcing term.
  Under appropriate assumptions, we establish the global existence of solutions
for small initial data in Lebesgue spaces when the exponent $p$ exceeds a
critical value. In contrast, we show that the global existence cannot hold for
$p$ below this critical value, provided the additional condition
$\int_{\mathbb{R}^N} \mathbf{w}(x) \, dx > 0$ is satisfied. The main challenge
in this analysis lies in managing the complex interaction between the nonlocal
nonlinearity and the forcing term, which significantly influences the behavior
of solutions.

AI.tldr: 研究带非局部非线性项和时空依赖强迫项的半线性抛物方程的整体解存在性与爆破行为
AI.motivation: 分析非局部半线性抛物方程 $\partial_t u - \Delta u = \|u(t)\|_{q}^\alpha |u|^p + t^{\varrho} \mathbf{w}(x)$ 的适定性和爆破行为，其中非局部非线性项 $\|u(t)\|_{q}^\alpha |u|^p$ 和时空依赖强迫项 $t^{\varrho} \mathbf{w}(x)$ 的组合带来了新的数学挑战
AI.techniques: 使用Lebesgue空间理论、比较原理、能量估计和临界指数分析，处理非局部非线性项与时空依赖强迫项之间的复杂相互作用
AI.main_theorems: 当指数 $p$ 超过临界值时，在Lebesgue空间中建立了小初值整体解的存在性；当 $p$ 低于临界值且 $\int_{\mathbb{R}^N} \mathbf{w}(x) \, dx > 0$ 时，证明整体解不存在
AI.significance: 扩展了非局部抛物方程理论，揭示了非局部结构与时空强迫项相互作用对解行为的影响，为相关物理模型提供了数学基础

title: Green's function estimates for time measurable parabolic operators on   polyhedrons and polyhedral cones
summary:
We provide Green's function estimates for parabolic operators on polyhedrons
and polyhedral cones in $\mathbb{R}^3$. These estimates incorporate mixed
weights, which include appropriate powers of the distances to the vertices, the
edges, and the boundary of the domains. The allowable ranges for the weight
parameters are explicitly determined by the geometry of the domains.

AI.tldr: 该论文为三维空间中多面体和多面体锥上的抛物算子提供了包含混合权重的格林函数估计
AI.motivation: 研究多面体和多面体锥上抛物算子的格林函数估计问题，这类几何结构在偏微分方程理论和应用中具有重要意义，特别是在处理具有角点和边缘的复杂几何区域时
AI.techniques: 使用混合权重方法，权重包含到顶点、边缘和边界距离的适当幂次；通过几何分析确定权重参数的允许范围；基于多面体几何特性的格林函数估计技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了多面体和多面体锥上抛物算子的格林函数估计，明确给出了包含顶点、边缘和边界距离权重的估计公式，并精确确定了权重参数由几何结构决定的允许范围
AI.significance: 为复杂几何区域上的抛物方程理论提供了重要工具，对理解具有奇异性的偏微分方程解的行为有重要意义，在数学物理和工程应用中有潜在价值

title: Velocity Averaging for the Wigner Kinetic Equation in the Semiclassical   Regime
summary:
This paper discusses the possibility of applying the velocity averaging
theorems in [F. Golse, P.-L. Lions, B. Perthame, R. Sentis: J. Funct. Anal.
76(1):110--125, 1988] to the Wigner equation governing the quantum evolution of
the Wigner transform of quantum density operators. Our first main results
address the case of the Wigner function of a special class of density operators
associated to mixed states, whose Hilbert-Schmidt norm is of order
$\hbar^{d/2}$, where $d$ is the space dimension and $\hbar$ the reduced Planck
constant. In space dimension $d=1$, we prove that the density function belongs
to the Sobolev space $H^s(\mathbb R)$ for some $s>0$. In the case of pure
states, we first obtain a characterization of the Wigner transform of rank-one
quantum density operators, and apply this characterization (1) to analyze a
rather general setting in which velocity averaging cannot apply to the Wigner
functions of a family of rank-one density operators whose evolution is governed
by the von Neumann equation, and (2) to obtain a quick derivation of Madelung's
system of quantum hydrodynamic equations. This derivation provides a physical
explanation of one key assumption used in the proof of the negative result (1)
described above.

AI.tldr: 将速度平均定理应用于Wigner方程，分析混合态和纯态Wigner函数的正则性，并得到量子流体力学方程的推导
AI.motivation: 研究将经典的速度平均定理应用于量子Wigner方程的可能性，探讨量子演化中Wigner函数的正则性，特别是混合态和纯态的情况
AI.techniques: 速度平均定理、Wigner变换分析、Hilbert-Schmidt范数估计、Sobolev空间理论、von Neumann方程、量子流体力学推导
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对于特殊混合态，在d=1维空间证明密度函数属于Sobolev空间H^s(R)；2) 给出秩一量子密度算子的Wigner变换特征；3) 分析速度平均定理不适用的情况；4) 推导Madelung量子流体力学方程组
AI.significance: 将经典PDE技术应用于量子演化方程，建立了量子与经典正则性理论之间的联系，为量子流体力学提供了新的数学基础

title: Extended convexity and uniqueness of minimizers for interaction energies
summary:
Linear interpolation convexity (LIC) has served as the crucial condition for
the uniqueness of interaction energy minimizers. We introduce the concept of
the LIC radius which extends the LIC condition. Uniqueness of minimizer up to
translation can still be guaranteed if the LIC radius is larger than the
possible support size of any minimizer. Using this approach, we obtain
uniqueness of minimizer for power-law potentials $W_{a,b}({\bf x}) =
\frac{|{\bf x}|^a}{a} - \frac{|{\bf x}|^b}{b},\,-d<b<2$ with $a$ slightly
smaller than 2 or slightly larger than 4. The estimate of LIC radius for $a$
slightly smaller than 2 is done via a Poincar\'{e}-type inequality for signed
measures. To handle the case where $a$ slightly larger than 4, we truncate the
attractive part of the potential at large radius and prove that the resulting
potential has positive Fourier transform. We also propose to study the
logarithmic power-law potential $W_{b,\ln}({\bf x}) = \frac{|{\bf
x}|^b}{b}\ln|{\bf x}|$. We prove its LIC property for $b=2$ and give the
explicit formula for minimizer. We also prove the uniqueness of minimizer for
$b$ slightly less than 2 by estimating its LIC radius.

AI.tldr: 引入LIC半径概念扩展线性插值凸性条件，用于证明幂律势能相互作用能量极小元的唯一性
AI.motivation: 线性插值凸性（LIC）是相互作用能量极小元唯一性的关键条件，但需要扩展以处理更广泛的势能函数，特别是幂律势能W_{a,b}在a接近2或4时的情形
AI.techniques: 引入LIC半径概念，使用Poincaré型不等式处理a接近2的情形，截断势能吸引部分并证明其傅里叶变换为正处理a接近4的情形，分析对数幂律势能
AI.main_theorems: 1) LIC半径大于任何极小元支撑尺寸时保证平移意义下的唯一性；2) 对a接近2或4的幂律势能证明极小元唯一性；3) 证明b=2时对数幂律势能的LIC性质并给出极小元显式公式；4) 对b接近2的情形估计LIC半径证明唯一性
AI.significance: 扩展了相互作用能量极小元唯一性理论，为幂律势能这类重要物理模型提供了新的分析工具，特别是处理了a接近2和4的关键参数范围

title: Dual Curvature Density Equation with Group Symmetry
summary:
This paper studies the general Lp dual curvature density equation under a
group symmetry assumption. This geometric partial differential equation arises
from the general Lp dual Minkowski problem of prescribing the Lp dual curvature
measure of convex bodies. It is a Monge-Ampere type equation on the unit
sphere. If the density function of the dual curvature measure is invariant
under a closed subgroup of the orthogonal group, the geometric partial
differential equation is solved in this paper for certain range of negative p
using a variational method. This work generalizes recent results on the Lp dual
Minkowski problem of origin-symmetric convex bodies.

AI.tldr: 在群对称假设下，解决了广义Lp对偶曲率密度方程，推广了原点对称凸体的Lp对偶Minkowski问题结果
AI.motivation: 研究广义Lp对偶Minkowski问题中出现的几何偏微分方程，该问题涉及凸体的Lp对偶曲率测度的预设。在密度函数满足正交群闭子群不变性的对称条件下，解决这一球面上的Monge-Ampere型方程。
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法处理球面上的Monge-Ampere型方程，利用群对称性简化问题，在负p值的特定范围内进行分析。
AI.main_theorems: 在密度函数满足正交群闭子群不变性的对称条件下，对负p值的特定范围，证明了广义Lp对偶曲率密度方程解的存在性，推广了原点对称凸体的Lp对偶Minkowski问题结果。
AI.significance: 扩展了凸几何中Lp对偶Minkowski问题的理论框架，将原点对称性推广到更一般的群对称性，为研究对称凸体的几何测度问题提供了新工具。

title: Second-order monotonicity conditions and mean field games with   volatility control
summary:
In this manuscript we study the well-posedness of the master equations for
mean field games with volatility control. This infinite dimensional PDE is
nonlinear with respect to both the first and second-order derivatives of its
solution. For standard mean field games with only drift control, it is
well-known that certain monotonicity condition is essential for the uniqueness
of mean field equilibria and for the global well-posedness of the master
equations. To adapt to the current setting with volatility control, we propose
a new notion called second-order monotonicity conditions. Surprisingly, the
second-order Lasry-Lions monotonicity is equivalent to its standard
(first-order) version, but such an equivalency fails for displacement
monotonicity. When the Hamiltonian is separable and the data are Lasry-Lions
monotone, we show that the Lasry-Lions monotonicity propagates and the master
equation admits a unique classical solution. This is the first work for the
well-posedness, both local and global, of master equations when the volatility
is controlled.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有波动率控制的平均场博弈主方程适定性的首个结果，提出了二阶单调性条件的新概念。
AI.motivation: 研究具有波动率控制的平均场博弈主方程的适定性问题。标准平均场博弈（仅漂移控制）中单调性条件对均衡唯一性和主方程全局适定性至关重要，但波动率控制引入了新的数学挑战。
AI.techniques: 提出了二阶单调性条件的新概念，分析了二阶Lasry-Lions单调性与标准一阶版本的等价性，研究了位移单调性的不同性质，利用可分离哈密顿量结构证明单调性传播。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 二阶Lasry-Lions单调性等价于其一阶版本；2. 位移单调性的等价性不成立；3. 当哈密顿量可分离且数据满足Lasry-Lions单调性时，单调性传播且主方程存在唯一经典解；4. 这是波动率控制下主方程适定性（局部和全局）的首个结果。
AI.significance: 首次解决了波动率控制下平均场博弈主方程的适定性问题，扩展了平均场博弈理论框架，为金融数学中波动率控制问题提供了理论基础，提出的二阶单调性概念可能在其他随机控制问题中有广泛应用。

title: Inverse random source problem for Maxwell equations in an inhomogeneous   medium
summary:
This paper concerns the inverse random source problem of the stochastic
Maxwell equations driven by white noise in an inhomogeneous background medium.
The well-posedness is established for the direct source problem, and the
estimates and regularity of the solution are obtained. A logarithmic stability
estimate is established for the inverse problem of determining the strength of
the random source. The analysis only requires the random Dirichlet data at a
fixed frequency.

AI.tldr: 建立了非均匀介质中随机Maxwell方程逆随机源问题的对数稳定性估计
AI.motivation: 研究非均匀背景介质中由白噪声驱动的随机Maxwell方程的逆随机源问题，旨在从测量数据中确定随机源的强度
AI.techniques: 建立正问题的适定性理论，获得解的估计和正则性，利用固定频率的随机Dirichlet数据建立对数稳定性估计
AI.main_theorems: 1. 正随机源问题的适定性结果；2. 解的估计和正则性分析；3. 逆问题中确定随机源强度的对数稳定性估计
AI.significance: 为随机Maxwell方程的逆问题提供了理论基础，在电磁波传播、遥感成像等应用中具有重要意义，特别是在非均匀介质中的随机源识别问题

title: Symmetry and classification of positive solutions of some weighted   elliptic equations
summary:
We study the weighted elliptic equation \begin{equation} -div(|x|^{-2a}\nabla
u)=|x|^{-bp}|u|^{p-2}u~~~\mbox{in}~\mathbb{R}^N
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~(0.1)\end{equation} with $N\geq 2$, which arises from the
Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg inequalities. Under the assumptions of finite energy
and $a_1+a_2=N-2$, for nonnegative solutions we prove the equivalence between
equation (0.1) with $a=a_1$ and equation (0.1) with $a=a_2$. Without finite
energy assumptions, for $2\leq p<2^*$ we give the optimal parameter range in
which nonnegative solutions of (0.1) in $\mathbf{L}^\infty_{Loc}(\mathbb{R}^N)$
must be radially symmetric, and give a complete classification for these
solutions in this range.

AI.tldr: 证明了Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式相关的加权椭圆方程解的等价性、径向对称性和完全分类
AI.motivation: 研究Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式相关的加权椭圆方程，该方程在加权Sobolev空间理论和几何分析中具有重要意义，特别是在研究加权Hardy不等式和临界指数问题中
AI.techniques: 使用加权椭圆方程理论、对称性分析方法、移动平面法、能量估计和分类技术，结合Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式的参数结构
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在有限能量和$a_1+a_2=N-2$条件下，证明$a=a_1$和$a=a_2$时方程解的等价性；2) 对$2\leq p<2^*$给出非负解径向对称的最优参数范围；3) 在该范围内给出解的完全分类
AI.significance: 深化了对Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式相关方程解结构的理解，为加权椭圆方程理论提供了重要结果，在几何分析和偏微分方程理论中有广泛应用

title: Analysis of linear Boussinesq-type models coupled with static interfaces
summary:
We derive a new approach to analyze the coupling of linear Boussinesq and
Saint-Venant shallow water wave equations in the case where the interface
remains at a constant position in space. We propose a one-way coupling model as
a reference, which allows us to obtain an analytical solution, prove the
well-posedness of the original coupled model and compute what we call the
coupling error-a quantity that depends solely on the choice of transmission
conditions at the interface. We prove that this coupling error is
asymptotically small for a certain class of data and discuss its role as a
proxy for the full error with respect to the 3D water wave problem.
Additionally, we highlight that this error can be easily computed in other
scenarios. We show that the coupling error consists of reflected waves and
argue that this explains some previously unexplained spurious oscillations
reported in the literature. Finally, we prove the well-posedness of the
half-line linear Boussinesq problem.

AI.tldr: 提出了分析线性Boussinesq和Saint-Venant浅水波方程耦合的新方法，建立了单向耦合模型作为参考，证明了原耦合模型的适定性并分析了耦合误差。
AI.motivation: 研究线性Boussinesq方程和Saint-Venant浅水波方程在界面位置恒定情况下的耦合问题，解决文献中报道的未解释的虚假振荡现象，为三维水波问题提供误差分析框架。
AI.techniques: 采用单向耦合模型作为参考解，分析传输条件对耦合误差的影响，使用渐近分析方法，证明半线性Boussinesq问题的适定性，研究反射波的形成机制。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了单向耦合模型并获得解析解；2) 证明了原始耦合模型的适定性；3) 证明了耦合误差对某类数据是渐近小的；4) 证明了半线性Boussinesq问题的适定性；5) 分析了耦合误差由反射波组成。
AI.significance: 为水波耦合问题提供了系统的误差分析框架，解释了文献中的虚假振荡现象，建立了耦合误差与三维水波问题全误差之间的联系，为其他耦合场景提供了可计算的误差估计方法。

title: Sediment Concentration Estimation via Multiscale Inverse Problem and   Stochastic Homogenization
comment:
20 pages, 7 figures, submitted to Archive for Rational Mechanics and
  Analysis
summary:
In this work, we contribute to the broader understanding of inverse problems
by introducing a versatile multiscale modeling framework tailored to the
challenges of sediment concentration estimation. Specifically, we propose a
novel approach for sediment concentration measurement in water flow, modeled as
a multiscale inverse medium problem. To address the multiscale nature of the
sediment distribution, we treat it as an inhomogeneous random field and use the
homogenization theory in deriving the effective medium model. The inverse
problem is formulated as the reconstruction of the effective medium model,
specifically, the sediment concentration, from partial boundary measurements.
Additionally, we develop numerical algorithms to improve the efficiency and
accuracy of solving this inverse problem. Our numerical experiments demonstrate
the effectiveness of the proposed model and methods in producing accurate
sediment concentration estimates, offering new insights into sediment
concentration measurement in complex environments.

AI.tldr: 提出基于均质化理论的沉积物浓度多尺度反问题建模框架，通过边界测量重建有效介质模型中的沉积物浓度。
AI.motivation: 解决复杂环境中沉积物浓度测量的挑战，将沉积物分布的多尺度特性建模为不均匀随机场，建立从边界测量反演沉积物浓度的数学框架。
AI.techniques: 多尺度建模框架、均质化理论、随机场建模、反问题理论、数值算法开发。
AI.main_theorems: 提出沉积物浓度测量的多尺度反介质问题模型，将沉积物分布建模为不均匀随机场，利用均质化理论推导有效介质模型，建立从部分边界测量重建沉积物浓度的反问题框架。
AI.significance: 为复杂环境中沉积物浓度测量提供新的数学框架，将多尺度建模与反问题理论结合，在环境监测、水文地质等领域有重要应用价值。

title: On a non-local phase-field model for tumour growth with single-well   Lennard-Jones potential
summary:
In the present work, we develop a comprehensive and rigorous analytical
framework for a non-local phase-field model that describes tumour growth
dynamics. The model is derived by coupling a non-local Cahn-Hilliard equation
with a parabolic reaction-diffusion equation, which accounts for both phase
segregation and nutrient diffusion. Previous studies have only considered
symmetric potentials for similar models. However, in the biological context of
cell-to-cell adhesion, single-well potentials, like the so-called Lennard-Jones
potential, seem physically more appropriate. The Cahn-Hilliard equation with
this kind of potential has already been analysed. Here, we take a step forward
and consider a more refined model. First, we analyse the model with a viscous
relaxation term in the chemical potential and subject to suitable initial and
boundary conditions. We prove the existence of solutions, a separation property
for the phase variable, and a continuous dependence estimate with respect to
the initial data. Finally, via an asymptotic analysis, we recover the existence
of a weak solution to the initial and boundary value problem without viscosity,
provided that the chemotactic sensitivity is small enough.

AI.tldr: 建立了肿瘤生长非局部相场模型的严格分析框架，首次考虑了单井势能（如Lennard-Jones势）并证明了粘性和非粘性情况下的解存在性
AI.motivation: 肿瘤生长动力学建模中，传统相场模型使用对称势能，但细胞间粘附的生物学背景更适合单井势能（如Lennard-Jones势），需要建立相应的严格数学分析框架
AI.techniques: 非局部Cahn-Hilliard方程与反应扩散方程耦合、粘性松弛项处理、分离性质证明、连续依赖性估计、渐近分析、弱解存在性证明
AI.main_theorems: 1) 带粘性松弛项的模型解存在性、相变量分离性质、初值连续依赖性估计；2) 通过渐近分析得到无粘性模型的弱解存在性（需趋化敏感性足够小）
AI.significance: 首次为生物物理更合理的单井势能肿瘤生长模型提供了严格数学基础，扩展了相场模型在生物数学中的应用，为肿瘤动力学模拟提供了理论保证
